---
title: "Konferansebidrag"
---

## Poster – Harstad 2025

**Title: Pathways Out of NEET: Profiling Young Adults Using Registry Data**   
**The 11th Nordic Health Promotion Research Conference:**, Harstad, 10.06.2026-12.06.2026

```{=html}
<iframe src="doc/poster_harstad.pdf" width="100%" height="800px"></iframe>
